data.name: kick 808
data.code: arrange([4, s("bd ~ ~ bd ~ ~ bd ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.88)], [8, s("bd ~ ~ bd ~ ~ bd ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.96)], [8, s("bd ~ ~ bd ~ ~ bd ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.96)], [4, s("bd ~ ~ bd ~ ~ bd ~").bank("RolandTR808").lpf(600).gain(0.7)])

data.name: dembow snare
data.code: arrange([4, s("~ ~ sd ~ ~ ~ sd ~").bank("RolandTR808").room(0.12).gain(0.72)], [8, s("~ ~ sd ~ ~ ~ sd ~").bank("RolandTR808").room(0.14).gain(0.8)], [8, s("~ ~ sd ~ ~ ~ [sd cp] ~").bank("RolandTR808").room(0.14).gain(0.8)], [4, s("~ ~ sd ~ ~ ~ sd ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.6)])

data.name: hats + perc
data.code: arrange([4, s("hh*8").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.18)], [8, stack(s("hh*8").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.22), s("~ crate_conga ~ ~ ~ crate_conga crate_conga ~").gain(0.3))], [8, stack(s("hh*8").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.22), s("~ oh ~ oh").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.16))], [4, s("hh*8").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.12)])

data.name: 808 bass
data.code: arrange([4, silence], [8, note("<c1 ab0 eb1 bb0>").struct("x ~ ~ x ~ ~ x ~").s("sine").decay(0.32).sustain(0.35).release(0.2).slide(0.1).shape(0.12).lpf(230).gain(0.64)], [8, note("<c1 ab0 eb1 bb0>").struct("x ~ ~ x ~ ~ x ~").s("sine").decay(0.32).sustain(0.35).release(0.2).slide(0.1).shape(0.12).lpf(230).gain(0.64)], [4, silence])

data.name: piano hook
data.code: arrange([4, note("<[c4,eb4,g4] [ab3,c4,eb4] [eb4,g4,bb4] [bb3,d4,f4]>").struct("~ x ~ x ~ x ~ x").s("piano").room(0.18).gain(0.4)], [8, note("<[c4,eb4,g4] [ab3,c4,eb4] [eb4,g4,bb4] [bb3,d4,f4]>").struct("~ x ~ x ~ x ~ x").s("piano").room(0.18).delay(0.15).delayfeedback(0.28).gain(0.42)], [8, note("<[c4,eb4,g4] [ab3,c4,eb4] [eb4,g4,bb4] [bb3,d4,f4]>").struct("~ x ~ x ~ x ~ x").s("piano").room(0.18).delay(0.15).gain(0.42)], [4, note("<[c4,eb4,g4] [bb3,d4,f4]>").s("piano").room(0.3).gain(0.34)])
